updates.title: Updates
updates.description: What's new in Asha — what was added, fixed and changed in every release, and the version you're running.
updates.updateAvailableHint: A newer version of Asha is available. Update your deployment to upgrade.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Programmatic access tokens for the Asha API. Each key carries scopes and an optional expiry; the secret is shown once.
apiKeys.liveOnlyNotice: API key management is live-backend only. Run with
apiKeys.createdToastDescription: Copy it now — it is shown only once.
apiKeys.newKeyBanner: New API key — copy it now
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create a key to enable programmatic access to the Asha API.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Receive HMAC-signed event callbacks for sessions, users, and recordings. Verify the X-Asha-Signature header against your secret.
webhooks.liveOnlyNotice: Webhook management is live-backend only. Run with
webhooks.emptyDescription: Receive HMAC-signed event callbacks for sessions, users, and recordings.

apiDocs.title: API Docs
apiDocs.description: Asha exposes a fully documented REST API with an interactive OpenAPI (Swagger) explorer.
apiDocs.interactiveExplorerDescription: Try every endpoint with live auth from the Swagger UI, served by the API at
apiDocs.openapiSpecDescription: Download the raw OpenAPI JSON to generate clients or import into Postman/Insomnia.
apiDocs.authDescriptionBeforeCode: Authenticate with a Bearer token from
apiDocs.authDescriptionAfterCode: or an API key issued under Developer → API Keys.
apiDocs.backendNotConnectedDescription: The embedded Swagger UI loads from the live API. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live to explore endpoints here.
apiDocs.openSwaggerUiNewTab: Open Swagger UI in a new tab
